'''bajasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabermetrician|sabermetrician]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-j-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabermetrician|sabermetrician]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bajasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæjæshæth|bæjæshæth]] || [[word:bæjæshæj|bæjæshæj]] || [[word:bæjæshæsh|bæjæshæsh]] || [[word:bæjæshæ|bæjæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bajajashath|bajajashath]] || [[word:bajajashaj|bajajashaj]] || [[word:bajajashash|bajajashash]] || [[word:bajajasha|bajajasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bajashath|bajashath]] || [[word:bajashaj|bajashaj]] || [[word:bajashash|bajashash]] || [[word:bajasha|bajasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bajafshath|bajafshath]] || [[word:bajafshaj|bajafshaj]] || [[word:bajafshash|bajafshash]] || [[word:bajafshaf|bajafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bajashatha|bajashatha]] || [[word:bajashaja|bajashaja]] || [[word:bajashasha|bajashasha]] || [[word:bajashaka|bajashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bajashath|bajashath]] || [[word:bajashaj|bajashaj]] || [[word:bajashash|bajashash]] || [[word:bajasha|bajasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bajashathal|bajashathal]] || [[word:bajashajal|bajashajal]] || [[word:bajashashal|bajashashal]] || [[word:bajashakal|bajashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bajashathatha|bajashathatha]] || [[word:bajashajaja|bajashajaja]] || [[word:bajashashasha|bajashashasha]] || [[word:bajashaka|bajashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bajashathan|bajashathan]] || [[word:bajashajan|bajashajan]] || [[word:bajashashan|bajashashan]] || [[word:bajashakan|bajashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bajashathaoro|bajashathaoro]] || [[word:bajashajaoro|bajashajaoro]] || [[word:bajashashaoro|bajashashaoro]] || [[word:bajashakaoro|bajashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
